seed_problem: Maximize total weight of satisfied clauses in a synthetic weighted CNF; checker computes satisfied weight / baseline.
mutation: composite: generalize the Boolean weighted Max-SAT input into a D-valued weighted Max-CSP over channel-equality literals (literal (v,a) true iff station v is tuned to channel a; clause established if any literal true), and skin as alpine rescue relay channel-tuning; objective stays weighted Max-satisfaction (maximize established priority weight) with the all-channel-1 tuning as the checker baseline.
title: Alpine Rescue Relays: Channel Tuning
strategies: all-channel-1 constant tuning (reproduces the checker baseline B, Ratio=0.1)
single-pass coordinate-optimal greedy: for each station pick the channel that clears the most currently-dark requirements given the rest fixed
coordinate-descent local search: sweep stations repeatedly, moving each to its best channel until no move helps (a local optimum)
multi-restart randomized local search: hill-climb from many seeded random channel tunings and keep the best-scoring one
weight-aware / priority-first heuristics that resolve heavy high-priority relays before filling in light requirements
